assertions.description: No encoder/rotary switch detection - board has 4 switches including encoder with A/B/switch signals
OLED/display interface not characterized despite being the primary function of this board
RP2040 boot mode configuration (USB boot vs flash boot) not analyzed
REVIEW: AVDD rail flagged as missing decoupling for RP2040 (U5) but AVDD typically has dedicated filtering via inductor - may be present but on a different net name
REVIEW: RC filter on OSC_OUT (1K + 30pF, fc=5.3MHz) is actually part of the crystal circuit load capacitor network, not a separate filter
